headline: Target Stock Up 31% Year to Date: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell?
summary: Target's 31% year-to-date rally reflects stronger traffic, merchandising, inventory discipline and omnichannel gains, but tougher comparisons loom.

raw.headline: Target Stock Up 31% Year to Date: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell?
raw.summary: Target's 31% year-to-date rally reflects stronger traffic, merchandising, inventory discipline and omnichannel gains, but tougher comparisons loom.

headline: Ahold Delhaize nominates former Amazon exec as stateside CEO
summary: Claire Peters, who also held leadership positions at Woolworths Group and Tesco, is expected to step into the leadership role on Sept. 8.

raw.headline: Ahold Delhaize nominates former Amazon exec as stateside CEO
